title: Lucky TNT Ore Light
description: This is an addon for the Ore Light resource pack that adds borders around the Lucky TNT Mod ores.
body:
# Description

This is an addon for the [Ore Light resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ore-light) that adds borders around the ores from the [Lucky TNT Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucky-tnt-mod). Borders are put around the Gunpowder Ore, Uranium Ore, and their deepslate variants.

# Dependencies

- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
